issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: B2B SaaS programmatic DV360 plan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentioned DV360 and audience targeting but lacked the Campaign/IO/Line Item hierarchy, named verification vendor, and >70% viewability threshold; treatment hit all rubric items.

scenarios.name: Cross-channel CPA reallocation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline violated the 20% weekly cap and missed the marginal-CPA principle and 7-day wait; treatment explicitly applied all three guardrails.
